name: tauri
description: A Tauri 2 development plugin with focused Codex skills for project setup, configuration, security, IPC, plugins, debugging, testing, distribution, and mobile workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Build, secure, test, and package Tauri 2 apps.
interface.longDescription: A focused local marketplace plugin for Tauri 2 development in Codex. It provides separate skills for scaffolding and migration, tauri.conf and capabilities, Rust IPC and plugins, shell UI features, debug/test workflows, and distribution/mobile release readiness.
defaultPrompt: Audit this Tauri 2 app before release.
Add a secure Tauri command and capability.
